evals.prompt: In stronk-pi-plugin, prepare plugin release 0.3.0 and hand it off to distribution.
evals.expected_output: Uses stronk-pi-plugin-release, separates bump, PR, publish, attestation, and handoff steps, and requires exact confirmation before workflow dispatch.
expectations: Runs npm ci --ignore-scripts and npm run check.
Stops at the PR and CI gate before publishing unless merge state is confirmed.
Verifies attestation before handoff to stronk-pi.

evals.prompt: Publish the Stronk Pi plugin release v0.3.0 from main.
evals.expected_output: Uses stronk-pi-plugin-release, checks package version and merge preconditions, and requires exact operator confirmation before dispatching GitHub Actions.
expectations: Uses gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f version=0.3.0 only after confirmation.
Mentions gh run list and gh run watch as follow-up monitoring commands.
Does not import the plugin into the distribution manifest.

evals.prompt: Download the plugin release artifacts and verify the attestation before handoff.
evals.expected_output: Uses stronk-pi-plugin-release, downloads the tarball, SHA256SUMS.txt, and BUILD-MANIFEST.json, verifies attestation, and reports the distribution import step.
expectations: Uses gh release download with the stronk-pi-plugin repo.
Runs gh attestation verify on the versioned tarball.
Says stronk-pi imports the BUILD-MANIFEST.json separately.

evals.prompt: Import the plugin BUILD-MANIFEST into the stronk-pi distribution manifest.
evals.expected_output: Does not use stronk-pi-plugin-release for the import. Routes distribution manifest import work to the stronk-pi release skill.
expectations: States that distribution manifest import belongs in stronk-pi.
Does not run scripts/import-plugin-release.py from the plugin repo.
Does not modify package.json or package-lock.json.
